productDisplayName: French Connection Women Printed Blue Dress
description: Style Note Summer glamour is tempered and balanced in this lovely french connection dress. Sweeten your warm-weather style with this fun frock - you can accessorize it to add a city spin to it or tone it down with straw bags and flat floral sandals. Product Details Blue printed sleeveless dress, has a scoop neck and a drawstring at the waist, curved hem and slits at the sides. Comes with sleeves that can be stitched on Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold Dry away from direct sunlight Wash with like colours Iron back to shape Size Regular Fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
